testcase.name: list > returns paginated accounts with defaults (AC-2)
list > passes industryFilter to where clause
list > passes platformFilter to where clause
list > passes stageFilter to where clause
list > passes levelFilter as evolutionProfile.level filter
list > passes anomalyOnly as anomalyFlags.some filter
list > passes search as OR name/user.email filter
list > respects custom sortBy and sortDir
list > includes evolutionProfile + user + _count anomalyFlags
list > writes cross_account_query/list_ip_accounts audit
detail > executes 6-table Promise.all and returns structured result (AC-3)
detail > anomalyFlags query only returns unresolved (resolvedAt: null)
detail > returns history with take 50
detail > writes cross_account_query/view_account_detail audit
flag > creates anomaly flag (AC-4)
flag > throws 403 for readonly_admin (AC-11)
flag > throws BAD_REQUEST if same (accountId, anomalyType) flagged today (AC-12)
flag > allows different anomalyType on same account same day
flag > writes data_mutation/flag_account_anomaly audit
unflag > updates resolvedAt + resolvedByAdminId + resolution (AC-5)
unflag > throws 403 for readonly_admin (AC-11)
unflag > throws BAD_REQUEST if already resolved (AC-13)
unflag > throws NOT_FOUND if flag does not exist
unflag > writes data_mutation/unflag_account_anomaly audit
addNote > creates note with visibleToOtherAdmin (AC-6)
addNote > throws 403 for readonly_admin (AC-11)
addNote > writes data_mutation/add_account_note audit
addNote > visibleToOtherAdmin defaults to true
forceFreeze > super_admin: auto-executes + updates frozenAt/frozenByAdminId/freezeReason (AC-7)
forceFreeze > super_admin: creates approval_requests with status=auto_executed (AC-7)
forceFreeze > admin (non-super_admin): creates pending approval + returns {status:pending} (AC-10)
forceFreeze > throws BAD_REQUEST if account already frozen (AC-9)
forceFreeze > throws 403 for readonly_admin (AC-11)
forceFreeze > super_admin: writes high_risk_action/force_freeze_account audit
forceFreeze > admin: writes high_risk_action/approval_request_create audit
forceFreeze > throws NOT_FOUND if account does not exist
getKpiStats > returns zeroed KPIs when no requests exist
getKpiStats > computes rejectionRate correctly
listPending > returns empty list when no pending requests
listPending > enriches items with displayStatus derived field
listDecided > returns decided requests in order
approveRequest > delegates to approveRequest service and returns ok
approveRequest > rejects when decisionReason is too short
approveRequest > throws FORBIDDEN for readonly_admin
rejectRequest > rejects a pending request and returns ok
rejectRequest > throws BAD_REQUEST when request is already approved
emergencyApprove > calls emergencyApproveSvc with incidentId and returns ok
emergencyApprove > throws FORBIDDEN when non-super_admin calls emergencyApprove
emergencyApprove > throws validation error when incidentId is empty
listPostReview > returns post-review items for super_admin
listPostReview > throws FORBIDDEN for non-super_admin
postReviewApprove > delegates to postReviewApproveSvc
generateForensicPdf > returns Buffer for a regular timeline (AC-1)
generateForensicPdf > generates PDF for empty timeline — isEmpty=true cover page (AC-10)
generateForensicPdf > handles 1000 timeline entries without OOM (AC-9 pagination)
generateForensicPdf > contentHash is SHA-256 of redacted timeline entries — deterministic (AC-6)
generateForensicPdf > requesterEmail and requesterRole appear in template data (AC-2/SHIELD)
generateForensicPdf > redacts sensitive fields in payload before computing payloadHash (AC-14)
generateForensicPdf > rejects PDF > 50 MB with descriptive error (AC-12)
generateForensicPdf > payloadHash for each entry is stable SHA-256 of redacted payload
generateForensicPdf > infers source correctly from record shape
byTraceId > returns empty timeline + zero summary when no records in any table
byTraceId > merges records from all 4 tables into timeline
byTraceId > returns partial timeline when only audit_log has records
byTraceId > timeline is sorted ascending by createdAt
byTraceId > summary.spanMs = last.createdAt - first.createdAt
byTraceId > writes audit logs for cross_account_query and view_trace_timeline
byTraceId > uses $transaction with SET LOCAL (AC-2)
byTraceId > traceId min 8 — shorter string throws ZodError
byUserId > returns timeline and total
byUserId > applies pagination correctly
byUserId > filters by eventCategory when provided
byUserId > filters by time range when startDate/endDate provided
byUserId > groups results by eventCategory
byAdminId > super_admin can call byAdminId without x-actor-mode
byAdminId > readonly_admin with actorMode=legal is allowed
byAdminId > regular admin is forbidden — throws FORBIDDEN
byAdminId > readonly_admin without actorMode=legal is forbidden
byAdminId > readonly_admin with actorMode=cs (not legal) is forbidden
byAdminId > high-risk events are flagged with isHighRisk=true
byAdminId > cross_account_query and security_alert are also high-risk
search > returns results matching keyword
search > SQL special chars in keyword do not throw (prisma contains escapes)
search > single-quote keyword with length >= 2 doesn't throw
search > keyword shorter than 2 chars throws ZodError
search > keyword longer than 100 chars throws ZodError
search > results capped at take:200
search > uses prisma.contains mode:insensitive (not raw SQL)
search > filters by eventCategory when provided
search > empty results when nothing matches
exportPdf > returns base64 string on success
exportPdf > returns traceId and caseNumber in response
exportPdf > calls generateForensicPdf with correct args (US-018 interface)
exportPdf > writes export_audit_forensic_pdf audit log (AC-7)
exportPdf > still succeeds when traceId has no matching records (empty timeline)
exportPdf > passes all 4 table results merged into timeline
exportPdf > regular admin (not super_admin/legal) is forbidden — AC-13
exportPdf > readonly_admin without actorMode=legal is forbidden
exportPdf > readonly_admin with actorMode=legal is allowed (法务模式)
exportPdf > reason shorter than 10 chars throws ZodError (AC-11)

testcase.name: aggregate > dimension=user groupBy=day returns correct shape
aggregate > dimension=specialist groupBy=week returns correct shape
aggregate > dimension=model groupBy=month returns correct shape
aggregate > dimension=provider groupBy=day returns correct shape
aggregate > multiple rows: totalCost sums with Decimal precision
aggregate > empty data returns {aggregations:[], summary:{totalCost:"0.00"}}
aggregate > startDate > endDate throws BAD_REQUEST
aggregate > date range > 365 days throws BAD_REQUEST with "date range too large"
aggregate > callCount converts bigint to number
top10 > returns userTop10 with correct shape
top10 > returns accountTop10 with correct shape
top10 > handles null _sum.costUsd as "0"
top10 > both lists empty when no data
specialistBreakdown > groups by agentId and returns expected shape
specialistBreakdown > avgCostPerCall = totalCost / callCount (Decimal precision)
specialistBreakdown > avgCostPerCall is "0" when callCount is 0
specialistBreakdown > returns [] when no data
alerts > users above $5 threshold are included in alerts
alerts > users at or below $5 threshold are filtered out
alerts > exactly $5.000001 is included
alerts > severity=low for $5-$10 range
alerts > severity=medium for $10-$15 range
alerts > severity=high for >= $15
alerts > returns [] when no users above threshold
alerts > returns email from user lookup
exportCsv > startDate > endDate throws BAD_REQUEST
exportCsv > date range > 365 days throws BAD_REQUEST "date range too large"
exportCsv > > 500k rows throws BAD_REQUEST "export rows > 500000"
exportCsv > returns CSV with correct header line
exportCsv > returns CSV rows with correct field values
exportCsv > returns rowCount in result
exportCsv > empty data returns only header line
exportCsv > chunks DB reads: calls findMany multiple times for large datasets
exportCsv > exactly 500k rows succeeds (boundary)

testcase.name: invitesRouter > list > returns paginated invite codes with count
invitesRouter > list > filters by statusFilter=active
invitesRouter > list > filters by campaignFilter
invitesRouter > list > writes audit log on list
invitesRouter > create > creates invite with explicit code
invitesRouter > create > auto-generates code when not provided
invitesRouter > create > sets campaign and expiresAt
invitesRouter > create > throws FORBIDDEN for readonly_admin
invitesRouter > create > writes audit on create
invitesRouter > batchImport > imports valid CSV rows
invitesRouter > batchImport > skips duplicate codes and returns row errors
invitesRouter > batchImport > throws ValidationError when rows > 10000
invitesRouter > batchImport > skips rows with missing code and records error
invitesRouter > batchImport > throws FORBIDDEN for readonly_admin
invitesRouter > invalidate > super_admin invalidates — creates auto_executed approval + deactivates code
invitesRouter > invalidate > admin creates pending approval_request — does NOT deactivate code
invitesRouter > invalidate > throws BAD_REQUEST when code already invalidated
invitesRouter > invalidate > throws NOT_FOUND when code does not exist
invitesRouter > invalidate > writes high_risk_action audit for super_admin
invitesRouter > invalidate > throws FORBIDDEN for readonly_admin
invitesRouter > detail > returns invite detail with activation history and step9 progress
invitesRouter > detail > throws NOT_FOUND when code does not exist
invitesRouter > detail > returns empty step9Progress when code not used
invitesRouter > campaignFunnel > returns funnel as [{stage, count}] array
invitesRouter > campaignFunnel > calls getCampaignFunnel with correct campaignKey
invitesRouter > campaignFunnel > propagates CampaignNotFoundError when campaign not found
invitesRouter > campaignFunnel > writes audit log on campaignFunnel
getOverview > returns null when kpi_snapshots is empty (AC-9)
getOverview > writes audit data_query/nsm_overview when table is empty
getOverview > returns latest + null previous when only one snapshot exists
getOverview > returns latest + previous + deltas when 2 snapshots exist
getOverview > serializes Decimal fields to numbers
getOverview > writes audit data_query/nsm_overview on success with data
getFunnel > returns empty array when no snapshot found
getFunnel > returns funnelData from latest snapshot when no date filter
getFunnel > passes date + granularity filter when date is provided
getDistributions > returns null when no snapshot found
getDistributions > returns all 3 distributions from latest snapshot
getDistributions > uses daily granularity for the latest snapshot query
getAlerts > returns empty array when fewer than 2 snapshots
getAlerts > returns empty array when metrics are not deteriorating
getAlerts > detects consecutive deterioration across 3 snapshots
getAlerts > alert includes metric, severity, and deltaPct
getAlerts > writes audit data_query/nsm_alerts
triggerSnapshot > returns 403 TRPCError when caller is not super_admin (AC-8)
triggerSnapshot > 403 error has code FORBIDDEN for non-super_admin (AC-8)
triggerSnapshot > writes privilege_escalation audit for non-super_admin (AC-8)
triggerSnapshot > calls computeSnapshot when caller is super_admin (AC-6)
triggerSnapshot > writes high_risk_action/manual_snapshot_trigger audit on super_admin success (AC-6)
triggerSnapshot > does NOT call computeSnapshot when caller is readonly_admin
prompts.listVersions > versions without canary config → canaryHistory empty arrays
prompts.listVersions > currentVersionId match → canaryHistory has one entry with canaryPct
prompts.listVersions > nextVersionId match → canaryHistory has entry for next version
prompts.updateCanary > non-super_admin → FORBIDDEN
prompts.updateCanary > invalid canaryPct → validation error
prompts.updateCanary > canaryPct=10 → direct DB upsert, no approval
prompts.updateCanary > canaryPct=0 → direct DB upsert (暂停灰度)
prompts.updateCanary > canaryPct=100 → requestApproval(dual=true), no direct DB update
prompts.rollback > non-super_admin → FORBIDDEN
prompts.rollback > reason < 20 chars → validation error
prompts.rollback > valid reason → requestApproval(rollback_prompt, dual=true)
prompts.runLlmJudge > non-super_admin → FORBIDDEN
prompts.runLlmJudge > super_admin → evaluatePromptVersion called + score returned
getQuotaOverview > returns plan distribution counts
listUserQuotas > delegates to listUserQuotas service
getUserDetail > returns quota + timeline for valid userId
getUserDetail > throws NOT_FOUND for unknown userId
adjustQuota > executes adjustment and schedules expiry job
adjustQuota > returns needsApproval=true for dual-approval path
adjustQuota > throws FORBIDDEN for readonly_admin
listAdjustmentLog > returns adjustment logs
getActiveAdjustments > returns active (non-expired) adjustments
getUsageStats > returns usage stats by plan with anomalous count
getUsageStats > uses default threshold of 80
getHourlyTrend > returns hourly trend data grouped by plan
listAnomalousUsers > returns anomalous users filtered by plan and threshold
listAnomalousUsers > allows readonly_admin to view anomalous users
getUserHourlyTimeline > returns 24h hourly call timeline for a user
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > returns paginated items and count
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > filters by statusFilter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > filters by userIdFilter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > filters by autoVerdictFilter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > applies dateRange filter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > writes cross_account_query audit log
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > readonly_admin can call list
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > handles empty results
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > returns full item with autoScanResult and metadata
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > returns userViolationCount from userViolationLog
